description: Static keyed <each> list render (§42). Three pre-initialized items render three .row <li>s with their labels. No input — the render shape itself. Whole-tree exposes impl#1's <div> each-container wrapper (OQ1 data point); anchored .row count is impl-neutral.
rationale: §42 <each in=@items key=@.id as item>: each item renders its body once, in order. The author addresses rows by class; the impl#1 container <div> is impl-private.
